name: Chinese Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 4 scallions (white and tender green parts) thinly sliced
10 snow pea pods cut into long thin shreds
2 tablespoons rice wine or white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the salad ingredients in a bowl.
2. Combine all the dressing ingredients and stir into the salad, mixing until the vegetables are coated.
3. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Stir the ingredients, then refrigerate for another 30 minutes. The salad will appear quite wilted.
5. Strain the salad by pressing it down firmly in a colander and put all the expressed liquid in a small saucepan.
6. Boil the juices down to approximately 1/4 cup and restir it into the slaw.
